html:
Dark Petals are obtained by picking Evil Flowers that spawn around Totally Normal Trees. If the world no longer has any Evil Flowers, player can find Dark Petals in Tumbleweeds with low chance or deconstruct a Nightmare Fuel to obtain 4 Dark Petals. An easier and cheaper method is haunting the Petals with Ghost Characters or Abigail (requires Team Spirit III skill) to get Dark Petals.

Dark Petals can be eaten to drain an additional 5 Sanity points (the value is not affected by freshness) or used to craft Nightmare Fuel using a Shadow Manipulator or a Prestihatitator.

Contents

  • 1 Dried Dark Petals
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Gallery
  • 4 Trivia

Dried Dark Petals

Exclusive to:

Dried Dark Petals are made from drying Dark Petals on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Dark Petal Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Usage

×4

×10

Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

×4

×8 / 6 / 4

Gallery

  • Dried variant concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

Trivia

  • Dark Petals were added in A Little Rain Must Fall update.

–Wilson

–WX-78
“Interesting, these petals seem to have a mind of their own.”

–Woodie

–Maxwell

–Wagstaff
“These were nöt made by Fröh.”
–Wigfrid
“They make our head hurt.”
–Webber

–Wilba

–Wormwood
“I found all this perfectly good ammo just laying on the ground.”
–Wheeler
“They seem mean-spirited.”
–Winona
“A tainted beauty.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, don't wanna carry these.”
–Wurt
“I feel funny... did I accidentally pick some poison oak?”
–Walter
“Picking them seemed like a good idea at the time...”
–Wanda

'''Dark Petals''' are obtained by picking {{DSTL|Evil Flower}}s that spawn around [[Totally Normal Tree]]s. If the world no longer has any Evil Flowers, player can find Dark Petals in [[Tumbleweed/DST|Tumbleweeds]] with low chance or [[Deconstruction Staff|deconstruct]] a [[Nightmare Fuel]] to obtain 4 Dark Petals. An easier and cheaper method is haunting the [[Petals/DST|Petals]] with [[Ghost Characters]] or [[Abigail/DST|Abigail]] (requires [[Team Spirit III]] skill) to get Dark Petals.

Dark Petals can be eaten to drain an additional 5 Sanity points (the value is not affected by freshness) or used to craft [[Nightmare Fuel]] using a [[Shadow Manipulator]] or a [[Prestihatitator]].
